Raptors Secure 5th Seed in Eastern Conference Playoffs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Toronto earned the **Eastern Conference's 5th seed** after the Magic lost their final regular-season game to the rested Boston Celtics, positioning the Raptors favorably against the Cavaliers—whom they beat in all three regular-season meetings (though pre-James Harden acquisition).[4]

signals.headline: Lakers and Mavericks Miss NBA Playoffs; Flagg's Mavericks Target Draft Lottery | YES | HIGH confidence**

Lakers and Mavericks Miss NBA Playoffs; Flagg's Mavericks Target Draft Lottery | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The **Los Angeles Lakers** fell to Cooper Flagg's Mavericks 134-128 (Flagg: 45 pts, 9 ast, 8 reb; his 2nd straight 40+ pt game as a rookie), amid injuries to key players like LeBron James carrying a depleted roster.[1][2]
